use_full_recipe_table: boolean value true = all recipes, false = selected list
selected_recipe_ids: List of UUIDs with comma seperated if partial fetch
api_recipe_ids: List of UUIDs with comma seperated if partial fetch
track_api_usage: boolean value true/false.Track API cost/usage if parsing_mode is api
save_with_timestamp: bolean value true/false Save CSV with timestamp or overwrite
enrichment_file_prefix: api prefix if parsing_mode is api
allow_category_override: boolean true or false it has been used in finalize_corrections.py file to overwrite category
